## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Hotel Engine and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows growth across most clusters, with industry-specific and practical tools performing well](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Plans to implement persona-based content tagging for better tracking and reporting](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Exploring ways to leverage Hotel Engine's AI analysis tool to improve content tone and specificity](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
  - [Discussing potential refinements to content clustering approach to better align with business goals](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Month-over-month growth seen across most content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Travel management and corporate travel down 7%, likely due to lack of new content](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Industry-specific content and calculators/practical tools showing strong performance](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Technology and software solutions cluster unexpectedly high, warranting further investigation](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

### Content Tagging and Tracking

  - [Discussing implementation of attribute tagging for GrowthX-created content](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Considering persona-based tagging over cluster-based for better alignment with business goals](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Joel to provide insights from AI analysis of sales calls to inform persona-specific content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)

### Content Clustering Refinement

  - [Carrie proposing to reduce number of clusters and focus on challenge/pain point-based groupings](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Potential new clusters: travel and spend management integration, cashflow/financial strategy, travel policy/compliance, maximizing travel ROI, modern travel management technology](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Aim to align content more closely with solving specific customer problems](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

### AI-Powered Content Optimization

  - [Hotel Engine using an AI tool analyzing sales call data to improve content tone and specificity](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
  - [Exploring ways to integrate this tool's insights with GrowthX's content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=2131.0)
  - [Discussing potential for direct access to the AI tool for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=2225.0)

### Per Diem Content Strategy

  - [Planning mini-cluster of programmatic content for per diem rates](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Focusing on high-search volume states and specific cases (e.g., Washington D.C., international rates)](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Testing approach with Alaska-specific content before expanding](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)

### Product Page Content Review

  - [Identified newer "What is Hotel Engine" page, considering consolidation with older version](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [Joel to review both pages and determine best approach for canonicalization and content updates](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Joel to share AI analysis tool insights and explore direct access options for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
  - [Carrie to discuss persona-based content tracking with Kyle and refine clustering approach](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [GrowthX to proceed with per diem content creation for selected states](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Joel to review and provide feedback on "What is Hotel Engine" pages](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [Continue refining content strategy based on AI insights and performance data](https://fathom.video/share/kiUCS4ZbiX96t4SyE3QA9Wc4MXjBQ9Jp?tab=summary&timestamp=2471.0)
